title: coleus shoolamudianus
intro: Coleus shoolamudianus, also known as wild coleus, is a plant species native to tropical regions. It is a member of the Lamiaceae family, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. Traditionally, the plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its leaves can be used in teas, tinctures, or applied topically for its medicinal benefits.
